import React,{useState} from 'react' import './booking.css' import {Form, FormGroup, ListGroup, ListGroupItem, Button } from 'reactstrap' const Booking = ({tour, avgRating}) => { const {price,reviews}=tour; const[credentials, setCredientials]=useState({ userId:'01', // later it will be dynamic userEmail:'example@gmail.com', fullName:'', Mbno:'', guestSize:1, bookAt:'' }) const handleChange= e=>{ setCredientials(prev=>({...prev, [e.target.id]:e.target.value})) } const serviceFee=10; const totalAmount=null; //send data to the server const handleClick = e=>{ e.preventDefault(); console.log(credentials); } return (

${price} /per person

{avgRating === 0 ? null :avgRating} ({reviews?.length})
{/* =========Booking form===================*/}
information
{/*======booking end==========*/} {/*=============booking bottom=======*/}
${price} 1 person
${price}
Service charge
$10
Total
$109
) } export default Booking
